steps.title: Recognize the assertion's two requirements
steps.content: The assertion claims provisioning services are reported in every region and represent the overall majority of reported services.

steps.title: Identify which choice proves both claims
steps.content:
The correct answer establishes both claims: “none of the percentages shown for provisioning services are lower than 33%” proves provisioning across all regions (with Central at the minimum), while the overall 75% proves it's the majority.
The other choices highlight only regional variation; a remaining choice confirms regional presence without the majority evidence.
B is correct.
